attributes.description: Overview of Codex logs in OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise

**Codex Logs**

This dashboard gives visibility into the Codex Logs data stream of OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise, showing how Codex agent activity is recorded and monitored. It highlights total events, unique users, and unique sessions, trends of Codex events by action over time, and event outcome breakdowns. It surfaces top actions, top Codex clients, top models, top tools, token usage over time, and the most active users. Use the controls above to filter by action, outcome, client, and user. Together, these panels offer a Codex-level view to support security oversight, auditing, and usage analysis.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai_chatgpt_enterprise/overview)**
